message:
feat(frankenterm-web): add frame-time bench harness + criterion benchmarks (bd-lff4p.2.10)

Adds two components for web renderer performance measurement:

frame_harness.rs — reusable frame-time collection types:
  - FrameTimeCollector: records per-frame Duration, dirty cells, patch
    counts, bytes uploaded
  - SessionReport: p50/p95/p99 histogram + patch stats, serializable to
    JSON for CI gating
  - JSONL stream output for per-frame diagnostics
  - 6 unit tests

benches/renderer_bench.rs — criterion benchmarks for CPU-side pipeline:
  - cell_from_render: Cell→CellData conversion (empty/ascii/styled)
  - cell_to_bytes: GPU serialization throughput
  - diff_to_patches: at 5%, 50%, 100% change rates for 80x24 and 120x40
  - full_buffer_patch: first-frame allocation cost
  - e2e_pipeline: Buffer→Diff→Patches→bytes end-to-end
  - frame_harness_stats: iter_custom with JSONL p50/p95/p99 output
  - first_frame: populate + serialize at 80x24, 120x40, 200x60

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
